validation_rules: If totals exist: total ~= subtotal + tax
If line items exist: total ~= sum(line_items.amount)
instructions:
Extraction Instructions:

Field Extraction:

- Invoice_No: Locate using label anchoring on "INVOICE NO", "Invoice No:", "INVOICE #", then extract the adjacent or next numerical value. Normalize to integer, strip spaces/commas/leading zeros.
- Customer_No: Anchor on labels "CUSTOMER NO.", "Customer No", "CUSTOMER NO", and extract nearby string (keep spaces, remove extraneous punctuation).
- Billing_Date: Locate using labels "BILLING DATE", "Billing Date:", extract the adjacent date value. Normalize to "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
- Due_Date: Look for "DATE DUE", "Due Date", extract the adjacent date, normalize to "YYYY-MM-DD".
- TOTAL: For the statement total, anchor on "TOTAL BALANCE DUE", "TOTAL DUE", "TOTAL", or "INVOICE TOTAL" (prefer the largest value near bottom/right or payment remittance section). Extract the number, remove currency symbols, commas, spaces.
- Bill_To: Immediately after "BILL TO:", extract multi-line address block until next label or blank line. Parse into address fields; if possible, use an address parser to fill AddressValue fields.
- Service_Address: After "SERVICE ADDRESS:", extract multi-line address block using the same logic as Bill_To, up to next label or blank line. Parse like above.
- Hauler_Name: Search for all-caps or prominent company block at top and remittance section (e.g., "FLOOD BROTHERS DISPOSAL / RECYCLING SERVICES"), capturing newline-separated lines.
- table_source: Hard-set to "Table_1" for first detected table region with line items.

Date/Number Normalization:

- Dates: Convert MM/DD/YY or MM/DD/YYYY to "YYYY-MM-DD".
- Numbers: Remove commas, currency symbols ($), and whitespace. Accept both integers and decimals.

Line Item Extraction:

- Table region detection: Locate the section between the last header row with labels matching "DATE", "DESCRIPTION", "QUANTITY", "RATE", "TOTAL" and the start of total/summary rows ("TOTAL", "TOTAL BALANCE DUE", etc.).
- For each line, map:
  - DATE: First column or leading MM/DD/YY string. Convert/normalize date.
  - DESCRIPTION: All following text columns/lines until numbers for QUANTITY/RATE.
  - QUANTITY: First numeric value after DESCRIPTION, matching decimal/float/integer pattern.
  - RATE: Next numeric value if present, otherwise leave blank.
- Handle multi-line DESCRIPTIONS by joining wrapped text between rows.
- For missing RATE, leave blank (empty string).

General:

- Apply proximity and label order as tiebreak for ambiguous values.
- If multiple blocks for any field, prefer first full occurrence or most complete nearest the keyword.
- Strip out extraneous punctuation, whitespace, or artifacts.
- Ignore page headers/footers and non-relevant values.
